task_description: Extract event listings from a conference schedule page, normalizing session titles, speakers, times, tracks, and room assignments.

input_data.context: The input file contains HTML content from a tech conference's schedule page. Events span 3 days and include keynotes, breakout sessions, workshops, and networking events. Each entry has a title, speaker name(s), time slot, track/category (e.g., 'AI/ML', 'DevOps', 'Security'), room assignment, and difficulty level. Some sessions have multiple speakers. There are 20 sessions listed.
